name: owner_landing_summary
primary_question: What owner-landing posture is represented by the committed receipt examples without claiming that an owner-local publisher has landed those candidates?
derivation_rule: aggregate committed reviewed owner-landing and source-route compatibility trace receipt examples into a bounded reference summary until real owner-local publishers exist
owner_truth_inputs: aoa-stats/stats/intake-contract/examples/session_harvest_family.receipts.example.json committed owner-landing compatibility receipts; no current stronger publisher
future owner-local landing status surfaces and receipts
authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local status surfaces, reviewed landing bundles, and owner repository decisions.
